get.summary: Get a single idea by run_id

delete.summary: Soft-delete an idea with full cascade
delete.description: Performs a soft-delete: sets status='deleted' with deleted_at timestamp, mirrors to crewJobs, cancels any running flow, unblocks pending approval gates, and invalidates response cache. The document remains in MongoDB for audit purposes.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.description: Unique flow run identifier of the idea to delete.

parameters.name: purge_remote
parameters.description: Also delete linked Jira issues and Confluence pages via their REST APIs (best-effort).

404.description: Idea not found or not owned by authenticated user.

409.description: Idea is in-flight (status=inprogress with active flow). Pause first.
